meta.name: Suka Smart Assistant – Architectural Boundaries
notes: SVFFH is a separate app. Only entitlement gating via SVFFHAuthBridge ➜ SVFFHClaims ➜ EntitlementFlags is allowed inside SSA.

rules.description: UI may depend only on features, managers, stores, services, engines, automation. UI cannot import db or schemas directly.
rules.message: UI must not touch DB or schemas directly. Use stores/services.

rules.description: Features are shells that cannot import UI or pages.
rules.message: Feature shells cannot depend on UI.

rules.description: Engines must be UI-free and side-effect-light. They may call managers, services, and read/write via stores.
rules.message: Engines cannot import UI or DB.

rules.description: Managers orchestrate domain tasks and cannot import UI.
rules.message: Managers cannot import UI.

rules.description: Services provide I/O, adapters, workers. No UI imports.
rules.message: Services cannot import UI.

rules.description: Stores are low-level state. They cannot import engines or managers.
rules.message: Stores must not import engines or managers.

rules.description: Only stores may access DexieDB directly.
rules.message: Access DexieDB only from stores.

rules.description: Runtime code cannot write to /schemas. Treat as read-only contracts.
rules.message: Schemas directory is read-only.

rules.description: All dispatched events must be declared in features/scan-compare-trust/automation/events.catalog.js or services/automation/events.catalog.js.
rules.message: Use the central event catalog for all CustomEvent names.

rules.description: Automation schedules must validate against /schemas/automation.schedule.schema.json.
rules.message: Schedule JSON must conform to automation.schedule.schema.json.

rules.description: SessionRunner and PrepSessionOrchestrator must pass through Guards.
rules.message: All session flows must include Guards.

rules.description: CalendarEngine must map via CalendarMapper and respect Hebrew/Gregorian settings.
rules.message: CalendarEngine must use CalendarMapper.

rules.description: SVFFH usage inside SSA is limited to auth bridge and entitlement flags. No direct marketplace or hub UI.
rules.message: Only SVFFHAuthBridge ➜ SVFFHClaims ➜ EntitlementFlags allowed.

rules.description: Co-op features must be gated by EntitlementFlags.
rules.message: Co-op code must check EntitlementFlags.

rules.description: Scan → OCR → ProductResolver → Pricing/Coupons/Safety must follow the pipeline; UI cannot call adapters directly.
rules.message: UI must call OCR worker, not adapters directly.

rules.description: Only PriceComparator and CycleAnalyzer may write to PricebookManager.
rules.message: Only comparator/analyzer can update Pricebook.

rules.description: InventorySync must be the only bi-directional sync point for Inventory ↔ Recipes/Plans.
rules.message: Prefer InventorySync for cross-domain inventory updates.

rules.description: Heavy features must be lazy-loaded via React.lazy or dynamic import.
rules.message: Use dynamic import for heavy UI modules.

rules.description: Web workers must not import UI or engines.
rules.message: Workers must be isolated from UI and engines.

rules.description: Each feature exposes only index.js(x)/js as public surface.
rules.message: Import feature modules via feature barrel index.

rules.description: Event names must be UPPER_SNAKE_CASE with 'EVENT_' prefix.
rules.message: Event names must match ^EVENT_[A-Z0-9_]+$.

rules.description: Automation must check Sabbath/Quiet Hours guards for scheduled actions.
rules.message: Scheduled tasks must respect Guards.

rules.description: CalendarEngine must export ICS via services/export.
rules.message: Provide ICS export for schedules.

rules.description: Interactive UI elements must include ARIA roles or labels.
rules.message: Add ARIA attributes to interactive elements.

rules.description: Stores must not import other stores directly except useEntitlementFlags and useUserProfile.
rules.message: Avoid cross-store coupling.

rules.description: Astronomy data must be sourced only via CalendarMapper adapter.
rules.message: Use CalendarMapper for astronomy rules.

exceptions.description: Temporary allowance for Scan UI to read pricebook insights for badges.
